scripts.dev: pnpm docker:up:detached && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && (pnpm dev:api & pnpm dev:worker & pnpm dev:web & wait)
scripts.openapi:generate:all: pnpm openapi:generate && pnpm openapi:generate:web && pnpm openapi:generate:mobile
scripts.local:dev: pnpm docker:up:detached && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm dev
scripts.test:live:api: pnpm docker:up:detached && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && bash scripts/qa/live-api-smoke.sh
scripts.test:live:flows: pnpm docker:up:detached && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm --filter @beauteavenue/web-admin test:e2e:flow && pnpm --filter @beauteavenue/web-admin test:e2e:panel
